[[General/Legends|General]] '''Muun''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officer who was in a temporary command of the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]] before it was captured. He was soon transferred to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] before it was [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]]. He owed his position to [[Sien Sovv]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
